---
pagetitle: "Lottes Griffin Portfolio"
description: "A portfolio of data analysis and machine learning projects."
listing:
  id: projects
  contents:
    - gdp.ipynb
    - okcupid.ipynb
    - pump-it-up-eda.qmd
    - pump-it-up-ml.qmd
    - uk-traffic.qmd
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  fields: [image, title, description, date]
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  date-format: "MMMM YYYY"
toc: false
---

::: {.lead-in}
Hi, I'm Lottes — a chemical physicist who fell for data somewhere between the gas-kinetics lab and the analysis that came after it. My PhD was spent measuring how magnesium behaves in the upper atmospheres of Earth and Mars; these days I bring that same instinct for finding signal in messy data to analytics and machine learning. Below are some of the projects I've built along the way.
:::

## Projects

::: {#projects}
:::
